description: Aetox — AI agent desktop: architecture that expands any model's capability (OCR, video, browser, desktop control)
notes: Portable build: WebView2 runtime is preinstalled on Windows 11; the image_ocr/video_ocr skills will explain how to get Tesseract/ffmpeg on first use (or use the full installer .exe from the GitHub release, which sets Tesseract up automatically).
